creator: dch@freebsd.org
text: Retested with latest FreeBSD-11.0-CURRENT-amd64-20150111-r276981-bootonly.iso, no change. It seems the same system when booted in "MBR" mode (e.g. from PCBSD 10.1 CD or from an external MBR partitioned disk) works, its only the UEFI mode that fails. Anything further we can help with here?
